title: henckelia albomarginata
intro: Henckelia albomarginata, also known as Sabah mint or white-edged Henckelia, is a species of plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is a type of herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henckelia albomarginata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Henckelia albomarginata is typically prepared as a tea or infusible herb, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and essential oils.
